s: In 1976, Gary Wheelock suited up for CAL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 27.000, WHIP 3.500, SO 2, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (CAL -> SEA).
In 1977, Gary Wheelock suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.890, WHIP 1.360, SO 47, WAR 0.500. Notable context: Joined SEA.
In 1980, Gary Wheelock suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.000, WHIP 1.670, SO 1, WAR 0.100.
